verses.text: Bezaleel made the ark of shittim wood — 2.5 cubits long, 1.5 wide and high. Overlaid with pure gold within and without; gold crown round about. Cast four gold rings at the corners — two each side. Staves of shittim overlaid with gold, in the rings to bear the ark. Guidance: First piece named in the building. The ark is where God meets His people; everything else flows from this. The first thing Bezaleel makes is the address.

Made the mercy seat of pure gold — 2.5 by 1.5 cubits. Two cherubim of beaten gold at the two ends; one cherub each end, of one piece with the mercy seat. The cherubim spread wings on high, covering the mercy seat; faces toward each other, toward the mercy seat. Guidance: Mercy is hammered out of one piece with the cherubim above it. Heaven's gatekeepers bend down to look at mercy. The whole tableau is heaven looking at the place sins are covered.

Made the table of shittim wood — 2 cubits long, 1 wide, 1.5 high. Overlaid pure gold; gold crown; handbreadth border with crown. Four gold rings at the corners hold staves. Shittim staves overlaid with gold bear the table. Vessels — dishes, spoons, bowls, covers — pure gold. Guidance: Twelve loaves will sit here — one per tribe, always before the LORD. Bread for the priests, made by the camp, set in God's house. Every meal in His presence is communion.

Made the candlestick of pure gold, beaten work — shaft, branches, bowls, knops, flowers all one piece. Six branches at the sides, three each. Almond bowls with knop and flower in each; four in the shaft. Knops under each pair. Seven lamps, snuffers, snuffdishes — pure gold. Of a talent of pure gold made it. Guidance: One tree of beaten gold. A talent — sixty pounds — hammered into living shape. Seven lamps before the vail. Jesus: I am the light of the world. The lampstand always pointed here.

Made the incense altar of shittim wood — 1 by 1 by 2 cubits, foursquare, horns of one piece. Overlaid pure gold — top, sides, horns; gold crown round about. Two gold rings under the crown for staves; shittim staves overlaid with gold. Made the holy anointing oil and pure incense after the apothecary's art. Guidance: Altar, oil, and incense — all made exactly as commanded. Prayer ascending, anointing flowing, perfume burning. The fragrance of God's house has its own recipe.
